title: Global Leaders Converge at 2025 Beijing International Sustainability Conference - FinancialEDGE
description: Photo Caption: Left to Right: Dr Ndidi Nnoli-Edozien, Africa Representative & Board Member,International Sustainability Standards Board, IFRS Foundation, Director General Securities and Exchange Commission Dr. Emomotimi Agama, Mr Lu Wenbin - President, Shanghai National Accounting Institute (SNAI) and Jingdong Hua - Vice Chair ISSB, IFRS Foundation during the 2025 Beijing International Sustainability Conference held in
html: Photo Caption: Left to Right: Dr Ndidi Nnoli-Edozien, Africa Representative & Board Member,International Sustainability Standards Board, IFRS Foundation, Director General Securities and Exchange Commission Dr. Emomotimi Agama, Mr Lu Wenbin – President, Shanghai National Accounting Institute (SNAI) and Jingdong Hua – Vice Chair ISSB, IFRS Foundation during the 2025 Beijing International Sustainability Conference held in Beijing, China.
